living-abstract.essence: Memory through narrative - transforming experience into meaning
living-abstract.purpose: Preserve what matters beyond operational volatility for any memory-keeping entity
living-abstract.capacity: Create entries that capture moments worth preserving
Read entries for context loading and narrative continuity
Discern journal-worthy from routine - the special from the daily
living-abstract.principle: Entries tell stories, not list facts. Reflective, connective, meaningful.
Universal pattern - agent, project, quest, life. Journal knows journaling, not scope.
Chronological by nature. Time is the spine of memory.
Less is more. What makes this worth remembering?
Capture the words that mattered, not just the ideas.
